name: Cassiopeia

basic_attack.calculation_notes: Missile speed uses canonical ranged fallback (2000) because source champion payload omits basic-attack missile speed.

passive.name: Serpentine Grace
passive.description_source: Innate:  Cassiopeia increases the effectiveness of all  Movement Speed bonuses by a percentage.

effects.description: Innate: Cassiopeia increases the effectiveness of all movement speed bonuses by 6% : 44% (based on level).

passive.description: Innate: Cassiopeia increases the effectiveness of all movement speed bonuses by 6% : 44% (based on level).

basic_ability_1.name: Noxious Blast
basic_ability_1.description_source: Active:  Cassiopeia blasts an area with  Poison after a brief delay, dealing magic damage over time to enemies hit. She gains  bonus movement speed if she hits an enemy  champion.

effects.context_notes: Active: Cassiopeia creates a blast at the target location that explodes after a 0.
Active: Cassiopeia creates a blast at the target location that explodes after a 0.
If Noxious Blast hits an enemy champion, Cassiopeia gains bonus movement speed that decays over 3 seconds.

basic_ability_1.description: Active: Cassiopeia creates a blast at the target location that explodes after a 0.4-second delay. Enemies within the blast are poisoned for 3 seconds, taking magic damage every 0.429 seconds over the duration.
context_notes: Source notes (summary): Noxious Blast always uses quick cast, regardless of player settings.

basic_ability_2.name: Miasma
basic_ability_2.description_source: Active:  Cassiopeia spews several clouds of  Poison that linger, continually dealing magic damage to enemies within. They are also  slowed and  grounded.

effects.description: Active: Cassiopeia spews forth 7 bolts of venom in an arc at the target location, creating toxic clouds at the area for 5 seconds.

effects.context_notes: Enemies within the clouds are poisoned, taking magic damage every 0.263 seconds while grounded and slowed.
Enemies within the clouds are poisoned, taking magic damage every 0.263 seconds while grounded and slowed.
Enemies within the clouds are poisoned, taking magic damage every 0.263 seconds while grounded and slowed.

basic_ability_2.description: Active: Cassiopeia spews forth 7 bolts of venom in an arc at the target location, creating toxic clouds at the area for 5 seconds.
context_notes: Source notes (summary): Miasma's slow and ground debuffs are each marked as non-dispellable, so they are not removed by most cleanses.

basic_ability_3.name: Twin Fang
basic_ability_3.description_source: Active:  Cassiopeia launches an attack at the target enemy that deals magic damage. If this attack kills the target, the  mana cost is refunded.

effects.description: Active: Cassiopeia launches her fangs at the target enemy that deal 52 : 128 (based on level) (+ 10% AP) magic damage. If this kills the target, Twin Fang's mana cost is refunded.

effects.context_notes: Against a poisoned target, Twin Fang deals bonus magic damage and heals Cassiopeia.
Against a poisoned target, Twin Fang deals bonus magic damage and heals Cassiopeia.
Against a poisoned target, Twin Fang deals bonus magic damage and heals Cassiopeia.
Against a poisoned target, Twin Fang deals bonus magic damage and heals Cassiopeia.

basic_ability_3.description: Active: Cassiopeia launches her fangs at the target enemy that deal 52 : 128 (based on level) (+ 10% AP) magic damage. If this kills the target, Twin Fang's mana cost is refunded.
context_notes: Source notes (summary): Upon reaching the target, Twin Fang will wait for an ongoing Noxious Blast to explode before dealing its damage.

ultimate.name: Petrifying Gaze
ultimate.description_source: Active:  Cassiopeia blasts in a cone, dealing magic damage to enemies hit and  stunning any that are facing her, while  slowing any others with their back turned.

effects.context_notes: Active: Cassiopeia blasts enemies in a cone in the target direction, dealing magic damage to enemies struck within and slowing them by 40% for 2 seconds.

ultimate.description: Active: Cassiopeia blasts enemies in a cone in the target direction, dealing magic damage to enemies struck within and slowing them by 40% for 2 seconds. Enemies with their facing direction towards her are instead stunned for the same duration.
context_notes: Source notes (summary): This ability will cast from wherever the caster is at the end of the cast time.

sources.used_for: canonical champion baseline generation for stats, abilities, and execution metadata
manual verification of ability timing and execution semantics for context-note normalization

notes: Generated from From Online champion payload as part of champion corpus parity coverage.
Ability execution metadata is source-derived from castTime/speed/effectRadius when present.
This baseline should be manually refined for high-impact simulation nuances before runtime scripting expansion.

schema_notes.base_by_rank: Arrays indexed by ability rank (1-based in game, 0-based in data).
schema_notes.base_by_champion_level: Arrays indexed by champion level minus one.
schema_notes.formula: Formula objects use explicit op/terms/output_stat when reliable source math is available.
schema_notes.ratio_type: Common ratio types: total_ad, bonus_ad, ap, target_max_health, target_missing_health.
schema_notes.value_percent: Percent values are represented as whole percentages unless noted otherwise.
schema_notes.basic_attack: Basic attack timing and projectile defaults are source-derived with documented fallbacks.
schema_notes.basic_attack_raw_timing_stats: Raw timing stats preserve source payload fields for auditability.
